desc.en: Regarding the planned metro lines for Taipei, many may not be completed until 2050 or later, and numerous routes remain in the planning stage. Please view this realistically, as the final outcomes may differ.
desc.zh: 為台北規劃中的地鐵路線許多線路可能得等到2050+時才會完工還有許多路線還處於規劃中請各位理性看待最終解果可能會有差異

reference: 爱发电,Sun Jul 12 2026 20:49:35 GMT+0800 (台北標準時間)
